item.title: Immunovant's FcRn Drug (Batoclimab)
item.description:
• Immunovant's FcRn inhibitor batoclimab has failed to meet its primary endpoints in a pair of Phase 3 trials for thyroid eye disease (TED). The drug, designed to reduce pathogenic IgG antibodies, did not demonstrate a statistically significant improvement in proptosis (eye bulging) compared to placebo. This setback represents a significant clinical hurdle for the company's lead asset in a competitive landscape for TED treatments.
  • FcRn (neonatal Fc receptor) inhibitor; reduces circulating IgG antibody levels.
  • Endpoints News
